mapper.select:
select position.*,user.name,user.user_name,user_type_enum,user.number,user.number,user.mobile,user.mail,user.password,user.sex_enum,user.status_enum from position LEFT JOIN user ON position.user_id=user.id
position.name=#{name}
and position.position_name like concat("%",#{positionName},"%")
and position.position_identity_name like concat("%",#{identityName},"%")
and position.description like concat("%",#{description},"%")
